name: HMS Commodator (FY 634)
events: 7 Mar 1945 HrMs Dolfijn (Lt.Cdr. J.B.M.J. Maas, RNN) conducted gunnery exercises off Dundee together with HMS Commodator (T/Skr. J.B. Davidson, RNR) which presumably towed a target. HrMs Dolfijn also conducted compass adjustment trials. (1)
9 Mar 1945 HrMs Dolfijn (Lt.Cdr. J.B.M.J. Maas, RNN) conducted exercises off Dundee together with HrMs O 15 (Lt. R.W. van Lynden, RNN) and HMS Commodator (T/Skr. J.B. Davidson, RNR). (1)
